Trending Polymarket Analytics Tool for Whale Insights | NO | MED confidence**  
Binance Square post highlights a Polymarket analytics tool revealing "x-ray vision" into top traders' strategies, whale bets, and smart money moves—traders are buzzing it could spot mispriced markets pre-move.[5]
